summary: Completed testing of bug fixes for SEO Automation Platform iteration 3. All backend APIs working (14/14 tests pass). Frontend features verified: Jurnal Publicări tab exists, article filtering by site_id works, dashboard GSC stats have site dependency.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1
design_issues.note: Charts render correctly despite console warnings - cosmetic issue only

passed_tests: GET /api/articles without filter - returns all user articles
Publication log entry has correct fields (id, title, site_id, site_name, etc.)
Frontend - Automatizare page loads with tabs
Frontend - 'Jurnal Publicări' tab exists and is clickable
Frontend - Empty state shown for no published articles
Frontend - Web2Page loads with article source dropdown
Frontend - Dashboard GSC section with Demo badge

1_article_filtering_per_site.details: GET /api/articles accepts site_id param. Web2Page.jsx uses currentSite?.id in useEffect dependency to re-fetch articles when site changes

2_jurnal_publicari_tab.details: AutomationPage.jsx has Tabs with 'Jurnal Publicări' tab. Tab shows table with Site, Titlu Articol, Data Publicării, Ora, Tip, Cuvinte columns. Backend /api/automation/publication-log returns enriched article data

3_dashboard_gsc_refresh.details: DashboardPage.jsx has useEffect with currentSite?.id dependency that triggers fetchData() and fetchSearchStats() when site changes

4_publication_log_endpoint.details: GET /api/automation/publication-log returns list with fields: id, title, site_id, site_name, status, created_at, published_at, wp_post_url, word_count, auto_generated, niche, category

5_articles_site_filter.details: GET /api/articles with site_id query param filters articles correctly. Backend query includes site_id in filter when provided

critical_code_review_comments: DashboardPage.jsx: useEffect with currentSite?.id dependency ensures data refreshes on site change - CORRECT
Web2Page.jsx: useEffect with currentSite?.id dependency ensures article list refreshes - CORRECT
server.py: /api/articles accepts site_id param and filters query - CORRECT
server.py: /api/automation/publication-log enriches articles with site info - CORRECT
AutomationPage.jsx: Tabs component with 'Setări & Calendar' and 'Jurnal Publicări' tabs - CORRECT
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_features_v3.py - Created test suite for iteration 3 features
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 features verified: 1) Article filtering by site_id works in both backend and frontend, 2) Jurnal Publicări tab exists in AutomationPage with correct table structure, 3) Dashboard GSC stats refresh when site changes via currentSite?.id dependency in useEffect, 4) /api/automation/publication-log returns enriched article data with site info. Note: Email notifications and image improvements mentioned in requirements were not specifically testable via API - would need WordPress integration test.
notes_on_untested_items: Email notifications on publish - Requires RESEND_API_KEY configuration and actual WordPress publish flow
Image size/uniqueness - Requires actual image generation which involves LLM/Pexels API calls
These features are implemented in backend but require end-to-end testing with real WordPress sites
